parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.system_prompt }, { role: 'user', content: `Analise o sentimento dos seguintes ${$json.posts_count} posts sobre ${$json.entity_type}:\n\n${$json.posts_text}` } ], max_tokens: 600, temperature: 0.1, response_format: { type: 'json_object' } }) }}

import json; d=json.load(open('/home/claude/wcic/n8n/subworkflows/SWF-openai-sentiment-analyst.json')); print(f'SWF Sentiment Analyst: {len(d["nodes"])} nodes - JSON válido')
